summary: Completed backend API testing for GITB LMS. All 31 tests executed - 29 passed, 2 skipped (no pending applications initially). Created test data to verify approval/rejection flows which worked correctly.

minor.issue: Preview URL returns 404 for /api endpoint while localhost:8001 works fine. This appears to be a platform routing issue.

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper authentication middleware and role-based access control
Email functions (sendWelcomeEmail, sendLoginNotificationEmail, sendPasswordChangedEmail) gracefully handle missing Resend API key
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses via projection: { _id: 0 }
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test applications with 'pending' status directly in MongoDB to test approval/rejection flows. Test data cleaned up after verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Login endpoint returns user data with token, admin dashboard returns stats, applications CRUD works, approval creates user account with auto-generated password, rejection updates status with reason, roles endpoint returns 5 roles, user role update works, login logs work, password change flow validates correctly. Preview URL has routing issue but localhost:8001 is accessible.

test_features_verified.login_endpoint: PASS - Returns correct user data (id, email, role, permissions) and JWT token
test_features_verified.admin_dashboard: PASS - Returns total_students, total_courses, pending_admissions and other stats
test_features_verified.applications_list: PASS - Returns all applications with filtering by status
test_features_verified.application_approval: PASS - Creates user account with auto-generated password, sets must_change_password=true, sends welcome email (Resend configured)
test_features_verified.application_rejection: PASS - Updates status to 'rejected', stores rejection reason
test_features_verified.roles_endpoint: PASS - Returns 5 roles: admin, registrar, lecturer, staff, student
test_features_verified.user_role_update: PASS - Updates user role and permissions
test_features_verified.login_logs: PASS - Returns login history with IP, location, timestamp
test_features_verified.password_change: PASS - Validates current password, rejects invalid passwords
